_publications._publicationTitle: mTOR kinase inhibition disrupts neuregulin 1-ERBB3 autocrine signaling and sensitizes NF2-deficient meningioma cellular models to IGF1R inhibition.

_contextSnippet: BMS + 400 nM INK128) revealed a left-shifted DRC, with a decreased IC50 of 3.2 μM (MR, 77.7%) compared with 4.4 μM (MR, 75.7%) for BMS-754807 alone
details: Co-treatment with INK128 (400 nM) and BMS-754807 showed decreased IC50 of 3.2 μM compared to 4.4 μM for BMS-754807 alone, with synergy scores >5.0 for all reference models
